subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet which God hath revealed in truth at this hour, and through it He hath sent forth a Temple in the kingdom, and there is none who ordaineth save Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح اظهره الله حینئذ بالحق و بعث به هیکل فی الملک و ما من مقدر الا هو لله
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
